milestone.title: Zero-command on-ramp
milestone.goal: After the single install command, a newcomer reaches their first verified feature purely by talking to the AI — no typed add.py commands

getting-started-rewrite.title: GETTING-STARTED: the conversational path becomes the spine

installer-handoff.title: init ends with an AI handoff; flags become optional

skill-onramp.title: Protocol-walk proof: /add drives fresh install to gated task, zero typed commands
